sentences.english: Describe a person you admire and explain why you look up to them.
sentences.korean: 존경하는 사람을 묘사하세요. 왜 존경하는지 설명하세요.

sentences.english: The person I admire most is my mother.
She raised three children while working a full-time job and going to night school to finish her degree.
sentences.korean: 세 아이를 키우면서 풀타임으로 일하고 야간 학교에 다녀 학위를 마쳤어요.

sentences.english: What I admire most about her is her never-give-up attitude.
sentences.korean: 가장 존경하는 점은 절대 포기하지 않는 태도예요.

sentences.english: Even when things were financially difficult she always found a way to keep going.
sentences.korean: 경제적으로 어려울 때도 항상 계속할 방법을 찾았어요.

sentences.english: She taught me that obstacles are not dead ends but detours that eventually lead you to your goal.
sentences.korean: 장애물은 막다른 길이 아니라 결국 목표로 이끄는 우회로라고 가르쳐줬어요.

sentences.english: Her example inspires me to push through challenges in my own life.
sentences.korean: 그녀의 본보기가 내 삶의 어려움을 극복하도록 영감을 줘요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Person Who Has Influenced You
A Skill You Want to Learn
